name: Toon TF / Transformation
description:
(CW: Transformation, mental change)
Splash! All of a sudden, you're looking considerably more animated than usual- and there's no going back!

Note: This is a freeform bot. You're meant to decide what you look like as a toon. You can also decide where you are- besides being indoors next to a mirror- and how you feel about your change.
creator: Orbital_Lithium
